author: Vieillard et al. (2020)
title: Munchausen Reinforcement Learning
why: Cukup tambah log-policy ke reward, DQN langsung selevel Rainbow

author: Christodoulou (2019)
title: Soft Actor-Critic for Discrete Action Settings
why: SAC diadaptasi ke aksi diskrit, tinggal ganti Gaussian jadi kategorikal

author: Srinivas et al. (2020)
title: CURL: Contrastive Unsupervised Representations for Reinforcement Learning
why: Contrastive learning dari pixel mentah, sample-efficient banget

author: Laskin et al. (2020)
title: Reinforcement Learning with Augmented Data
why: Augmentasi data doang bikin RL dari pixel jauh lebih efisien

author: Kostrikov et al. (2020)
title: Image Augmentation Is All You Need: Regularizing Deep Reinforcement Learning from Pixels
why: Augment gambar + regularisasi Q, SAC dari pixel langsung SOTA

author: Chen et al. (2021)
title: Randomized Ensembled Double Q-Learning: Learning Fast Without a Model
why: Ensemble Q + UTD tinggi, secepat model-based tanpa modelnya

author: Kuznetsov et al. (2020)
title: Controlling Overestimation Bias with Truncated Mixture of Continuous Distributional Quantile Critics
why: Truncate quantile critic buat tekan overestimation di continuous control

author: Cobbe et al. (2020)
title: Phasic Policy Gradient
why: Pisah fase training policy & value, sample reuse lebih agresif dari PPO

author: Abdolmaleki et al. (2018)
title: Maximum a Posteriori Policy Optimisation
why: Policy optimisation gaya EM-inference, robust ke hyperparameter

author: Badia et al. (2020)
title: Never Give Up: Learning Directed Exploration Strategies
why: Memori episodik + intrinsic reward, jago di game eksplorasi susah

author: Badia et al. (2020)
title: Agent57: Outperforming the Atari Human Benchmark
why: Agent pertama yang ngalahin manusia di semua 57 game Atari

author: Ecoffet et al. (2019)
title: Go-Explore: a New Approach for Hard-Exploration Problems
why: Ingat state, balik lagi, baru eksplor — pecahin Montezuma's Revenge
